original_draft.goal: Perform multi-perspective analysis on any document by delegating to three specialist Worker Bee agents (Researcher, Analyst, Strategist), then synthesizing their findings into a cross-referenced intelligence report.
success_criteria: All three specialist agents (researcher, analyst, strategist) have been consulted via delegate_to_sub_agent
Final report includes consensus findings, conflicts between specialists, unique insights, and blind spots
Prioritized action items are provided with clear next steps
Report is saved and presented to the user
constraints: Never fabricate findings — only report what is found in the provided document
Every finding must be attributed to its source specialist
Sub-agents must not use external knowledge beyond the provided document

nodes.name: Document Intake
nodes.description: Receives document text from the user and clarifies analysis needs.
nodes.success_criteria: User has provided document text and analysis needs have been clarified.

nodes.name: Coordinator (Queen Bee)
nodes.description: Orchestrates multi-perspective analysis by delegating to specialist sub-agents and synthesizing their findings into a cross-referenced report.
nodes.success_criteria: All three specialists consulted and cross-referenced synthesis report generated.

nodes.name: Researcher (Worker Bee)
nodes.description: Extracts entities, facts, dates, figures, and external references from documents.
nodes.success_criteria: Structured factual extraction complete with confidence flags.

nodes.name: Analyst (Worker Bee)
nodes.description: Checks internal consistency, detects contradictions, and identifies logical gaps.
nodes.success_criteria: Internal consistency analysis complete with severity-rated findings.

nodes.name: Strategist (Worker Bee)
nodes.description: Assesses risks, evaluates implications, and recommends actions.
nodes.success_criteria: Risk matrix and prioritized action items generated.
